allow: Bash(node -e "const l = require\(''lucide-react''\); console.log\(''GitCompareArrows:'', !!l.GitCompareArrows\); console.log\(''Send:'', !!l.Send\); console.log\(''ArrowDownWideNarrow:'', !!l.ArrowDownWideNarrow\); console.log\(''CircleX:'', !!l.CircleX\); console.log\(''Timer:'', !!l.Timer\); console.log\(''Sparkles:'', !!l.Sparkles\);")

Bash(node --no-experimental-strip-types -e 'var l = require\(""lucide-react""\); var names = [""GitCompareArrows"",""Send"",""ArrowDownWideNarrow"",""CircleX"",""Timer"",""Sparkles"",""Rows2"",""Columns2""]; names.forEach\(function\(n\) { console.log\(n, typeof l[n] === ""function"" ? ""OK"" : ""MISSING""\); }\);')

Bash(node --no-experimental-strip-types -e 'var l = require\(""lucide-react""\); var names = [""GitCompareArrows"",""Send"",""ArrowDownWideNarrow"",""CircleX"",""Timer"",""Sparkles"",""Rows2"",""Columns2"",""GitCompare"",""SendHorizontal"",""ArrowDownNarrowWide"",""XCircle"",""Clock"",""Wand2"",""LayoutGrid"",""LayoutList""]; names.forEach\(function\(n\) { console.log\(n, typeof l[n] === ""function"" ? ""OK"" : ""MISSING""\); }\);')
Bash(node --no-experimental-strip-types -e 'var l = require\(""lucide-react""\); console.log\(typeof l.Play\); console.log\(Object.keys\(l\).length\);')

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command '$ErrorActionPreference="Stop"; try { $r = Invoke-RestMethod -Method Post -Uri "https://dl.alexgr.space/api/v1/auth/token" -Headers @{ Authorization = "Bearer $env:DL_API_KEY" }; Write-Host "OK token starts:" $r.token.Substring\(0,10\) } catch { Write-Host "FAIL:" $_.Exception.Message; Write-Host "Type:" $_.Exception.GetType\(\).FullName }')
